name: corply
description: Incorporate a Delaware C-Corp from your AI agent: intake, document generation, cofounder e-signature, and human-reviewed filing handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Incorporate a Delaware C-Corp from your AI agent.
interface.longDescription: Corply guides founders from incorporation intake to generated formation documents, cofounder e-signature, and human-reviewed Delaware filing handoff. Corply is not a law firm.
defaultPrompt: Use Corply to incorporate my startup.
Use Corply to check my incorporation status.
Use Corply to send cofounder signature links.
